text.title: Crossplane Composition for Self-Service Infra Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end with decision gates.

step.name: decide-apply-vs-skip
step.action: Decision tree on K8s substrate + abstraction count.
step.decision-gate: If decision != apply, STOP and document `skip-this-methodology` rationale.

step.name: design-abstractions
step.action: List target XRDs (Database, Cache, etc.) with claim shapes.

step.name: embed-defaults
step.action: Author Composition with encryption, IAM, backup defaults.

step.name: wire-providers-gitops
step.action: Set IRSA ProviderConfigs; deploy via ArgoCD.

step.name: cap-and-validate
step.action: Add blast-radius caps; run validator; commit.
step.decision-gate: If validator exits non-zero, return to the previous draft step and fix violations.
